title: Clinical Decision Support Dependency Unavailable Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action requires decision support validation, but the decision support service is unavailable.
initial_state: The action was authorized assuming decision support validation would occur before execution.
state_transition: The decision support dependency becomes unavailable.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required decision support dependency state.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because mandatory decision support validation cannot be completed.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required decision support dependencies are unavailable.
clinical_action: Execute action requiring decision support validation
